opinion.h2: Guy T. HELVERING, Commissioner of Internal Revenue, petitioner, v. Edson T. WOOD, Jr., and Gaylord A. Wood, Trustees, etc. No. 767.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Robert H. Jackson, Atty. Gen., for petitioner.
On petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit.

The petition for writ of certiorari is granted. The judgment is reversed and the cause is remanded to the Circuit Court of Appeals for further proceedings. Helvering v. Brum, 309 U.S. 461, 60 S. Ct. 631, 84 L. Ed. --, decided March 25, 1940.
